product_overview: CinePurr is a social, synchronized video-watching web app that lets people discover public rooms, watch videos in sync, chat in real time, suggest and vote on queue items, and earn XP through daily engagement.
core_goals: Discover and join live watch rooms to watch videos in sync with others
Chat, react, and participate in a shared video experience in real time
Suggest videos and vote on the room queue to influence what plays next
Create and manage a local account to save watchlists, track XP/streaks, and view personal stats
Complete daily quests and view leaderboards to track progress and social engagement

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate to a personal account using email/username and password to access personalized features (watchlist, XP, friends).
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email or username input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> See personalized homepage
Navigate to /login -> Fill email or username input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect value -> Submit login form -> See error message about invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account so the user can save watchlists, earn XP, and participate with a persistent identity.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill username input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit registration form -> See welcome message and be redirected to homepage

Navigate to /register -> Fill username input field -> Fill email input field with invalid format -> Fill password input field -> Submit registration form -> See inline validation error for email format

features.name: Room Discovery (Homepage)
features.description: Browse and discover public and trending watch rooms from the homepage server browser to join active sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Browse server browser or room list -> Filter or sort rooms by trending or recent -> Choose a public room from the list -> Join the chosen room and see video playback and chat
Navigate to / -> Use recommendations or recent rooms widget -> Select a room to join -> Join the room and see host and viewer list

features.name: Watch Room — Synchronized Playback & Chat
features.description: Join a watch room to view synchronized video playback with host authority, participate in real-time chat, and see typing indicators and recent history.
user_flows: Join a watch room from room discovery or an invite -> View synchronized video playback following host timing -> Type message into chat input -> Send message -> See message appear in chat history
Join a watch room -> Observe typing indicators when others type -> Scroll chat history to read recent messages

features.name: Video Queue & Voting
features.description: Suggest videos to the room queue, vote on queued items, and let the host play top-voted items.
user_flows: Join a room -> Add video to queue by submitting a URL or selecting a search result -> See the queued item appear in the queue list
Join a room -> Locate a queue item -> Upvote the queue item -> See vote count increase and item reorder accordingly

features.name: Chat & Reactions
features.description: Send real-time chat messages, attach emoji reactions to messages, and trigger floating video reactions visible to all viewers.
user_flows: Join a room -> Type message into chat input -> Send message -> See message appear for all viewers and be stored in recent chat history
Join a room -> React to an existing chat message with an emoji -> See reaction count update on the message and a floating reaction appear over the video

features.name: Video Search (TMDB & YouTube URL)
features.description: Find movies, TV episodes via TMDB search and add direct YouTube URLs so rooms can play a wide variety of video sources.
user_flows: Open video search modal from homepage or room -> Enter movie or TV show query -> See TMDB results with poster, overview, and year -> Select a result to preview or add to queue
Open video add dialog -> Paste a YouTube URL -> Submit the URL -> See the video added to the queue or available for the host to play

features.name: Watchlist & Watch History
features.description: Save TMDB results to a personal watchlist and view an auto-logged history of watched items for easy rejoin and review.
user_flows: Open video search modal -> Save a movie or TV result to personal watchlist -> Open watchlist from homepage -> See saved item listed with poster and remove option
Join a room and trigger a video change -> Automatic watch history entry is created for the user -> Open watch history window -> See recent entries with a link to rejoin the corresponding room

features.name: Progress, Daily Quests & Leaderboards
features.description: Track XP and levels, view daily quests to earn rewards, and compare activity on leaderboards to encourage engagement.
user_flows: Login to account -> View daily quests and XP display on the homepage -> Complete a quest by joining rooms or sending messages -> See quest progress update and XP reward applied
Navigate to / -> Open leaderboards section -> See top users by watch time, level, streak, and messages sent -> Click a username to view their profile or join their room

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: Fill email or username input field
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Watch Room
features.description: Join a synchronized video room with chat
